_meta.purpose: Fixture-mode replay for the v0.13.1+ primary-source poller. Tests pass this synthesized RSS / CSAF-index content through ctx.fixtures.advisories[<feed>] to exercise the parser + de-duplication + report shape without hitting upstream feeds.
_meta.shape_note: Each feed key carries either an RSS / Atom XML string (qualys, usn, zdi, kernel-org, oss-security, jfrog, cisa-current, bleepingcomputer-security, thehackernews), a CSAF-index newline-separated filename list (rhsa), or a GitHub-events JSON array (nightmare-eclipse-github). Real fetchDiff branches on feed.kind to select the parser. v0.13.3 added kernel-org, oss-security, jfrog, cisa-current. v0.13.14 added microsoft-security-blog / sysdig-blog / trail-of-bits-blog / embrace-the-red. v0.13.17 added bleepingcomputer-security / thehackernews (tech-press RSS) and nightmare-eclipse-github (github-events JSON) — closes the researcher-GitHub-drop intake gap surfaced by the MiniPlasma / YellowKey / GreenPlasma / UnDefend cluster.
